iti67:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti67:2.1: “Monks, there are these three forms of sagacity.
iti67:2.3: Bodily sagacity, verbal sagacity, mental sagacity.
iti67:2.4: These are the three forms of sagacity.”
iti67:3.1: A sage in body, a sage in speech,
iti67:3.4: is said to be bathed of evil.
